question.label: Support needed
question.name: What would help make the next couple of weeks steadier for you?
question.description: Ends by moving toward support and near-term stabilization without introducing a new thread.

answer: I can own bigger direction, but I need real authority to do it.

assessment.note: Names a concrete authority gap tied to direction; this is a clarity deficit, not a wellbeing signal.

new_queue.label: Authority gap
new_queue.name: What authority do you need to own bigger direction well?

history.answer_excerpt: I have been less present in rituals, yes.

I stayed focused on delivery because that felt controllable.
I can own bigger direction, but I need real authority to do it.

Mentoring has been one place where I still feel useful.
